title: pelargonium × impurum
intro: Pelargonium × regnellii, not Pelargonium × impurum, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. It is also known as the " Cape Geranium" and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds like rosmarinic acid, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, potentially providing health benefits such as reducing fever and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × regnellii often include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
